Metadata.title: Bartosz Art
Metadata.description: Bartosz Art — Full-Stack Developer and Software Engineer focused on building modern, high-performance, user-centered applications and systems.

bujnickaDent.snippet: A comprehensive dental practice management system with a strong focus on security and data protection. It enables online appointment booking, schedule management, notifications, and administrative workflows. The solution has been deployed and supports the clinic's daily operations.

modernCar.snippet: A commercial website for an automotive detailing studio specializing in vehicle care, protection, and customization. Built using plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a strong emphasis on effective service presentation, smooth animations, and full responsiveness across mobile and desktop devices.
